identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

theme.name: Swiss Urgency
theme.description: A high-contrast, objective design that prioritizes speed and trust. White backgrounds, stark black text, and signal orange/red for emergency actions.

headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, and major calls to action. Use tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Paragraphs, inputs, labels, and data tables.

primary.name: Emergency Orange
primary.usage: Primary CTAs (Book Now), Emergency Toggles, Urgent Badges

marketing.hero_style: Split screen or Heavy Typography + Action Box

dashboard.surface: Flat cards with 1px borders, no shadows

booking_flow.focus: One question per screen on mobile, 2-column on desktop

buttons.style: Sharp corners or small radius (rounded-md). High contrast.

cards.style: Flat, 1px border (border-slate-200), no shadow by default. Hover: Lift + Shadow.

inputs.style: Tall (h-12), bg-slate-50, border-slate-200. Focus: Ring-2 ring-orange-500/20

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on solid backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use only for sticky headers and floating action bars (backdrop-blur-xl).
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (Duotone) for marketing, Lucide for UI.

hero.description: Service van arriving, implies speed and readiness

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a high-trust, high-speed emergency service platform. Do not make it look like a generic SaaS. It should feel like a utility tool.
critical_rules: Use the 'Chivo' font for all headings. Import it in index.css.
Do not use gradients for the primary action button. Solid Orange only.
Ensure the 'Emergency' toggle or badge is visible in the hero.
Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections.
Follow the 'Bento Grid' layout for the services section.
Dashboard must be dense and data-rich, not airy like the landing page.
step_by_step: 1. Setup Tailwind config with new colors and fonts.
2. Create the Landing Page with Hero, Services (Bento), and Trust sections.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.design_philosophy: Avoid 'AI Slop'. Create distinct, character-rich interfaces.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.interaction: Every button needs a hover and active state. Use 'sonner' for toasts.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.spacing: Use 2x more whitespace than you think is necessary for marketing pages.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT.accessibility: Ensure text contrast is AA compliant. Use data-testid for all interactive elements.
